title: $DSP_FIELDLIST
text: $DSP_FIELDLIST Specify what fields to use for DSP client communication. $DSP_FIELDLIST { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: client assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 0 (None) Description When $DSP_FIELDLIST is set to 1, the fields included in the DSP client communication are based upon the field list as it is generated by the compiler. For details about what is included, see Field Lists . If $DSP_FIELDLIST is set to 0, only fields included in the component structure are included in the communication. By default, fields that are not part of the component structure are not included in the client communication. Related Links Field Lists A component's field list determines how Uniface manages the fields when retrieving occurrences into the component at runtime. The field list includes not only the fields that are part of the component data structure, but also other fields that may be required, for example, because they are referenced in ProcScript or part of a key.
